title: Interview Prep · Arrays & Strings
description: Common interview patterns: two pointers, sliding window, hashing.

lessons.title: Reverse Array
lessons.subtitle: Two pointers in place
lessons.task: Reverse the array in place with two pointers. Expected: [5, 4, 3, 2, 1]
lessons.hint: Swap a[i] with a[a.length-1-i] until i >= a.length/2.

lessons.title: Is Palindrome
lessons.subtitle: Chars from both ends
lessons.task: Return true for palindromes. Expected: true
lessons.hint: Walk pointers from both ends comparing characters.

lessons.title: Frequency Map
lessons.subtitle: HashMap counting
lessons.hint: Iterate with charAt, increment a counter when the char matches.

lessons.title: Two Sum
lessons.subtitle: Hash map lookups
lessons.hint: Store value→index in a HashMap, look up target - nums[i] as you iterate.

lessons.title: Max Subarray (Kadane)
lessons.subtitle: DP in one pass
lessons.hint: Track current = max(nums[i], current + nums[i]) and best so far.

lessons.title: Valid Anagram
lessons.subtitle: Counting vs sorting
lessons.task: Return true if b is an anagram of a. Expected: true
lessons.hint: Count letters in an int[26] and compare, or sort both char arrays.

lessons.title: Move Zeros
lessons.subtitle: Two pointers, stable
lessons.task: Push zeros to the end preserving order. Expected: [1, 3, 12, 0, 0]
lessons.hint: Write-pointer w: copy non-zero to a[w], then zero-fill from w.

lessons.title: Longest Unique Substring
lessons.subtitle: Sliding window
lessons.task: Length of longest substring without repeating chars. Expected: 3
lessons.hint: HashSet window; advance left while chars repeat.

lessons.title: Group Anagrams
lessons.subtitle: Hash by signature
lessons.task: Print the count of distinct anagram groups. Expected: 3
lessons.hint: Sort each word's chars and use that sorted string as the map key.

lessons.title: Product Except Self
lessons.subtitle: Prefix / suffix sweep
lessons.task: Return array where out[i] = product of all nums except nums[i]. Expected: [24, 12, 8, 6]
lessons.hint: Left-prefix pass then right-suffix pass, multiplying into result.
